exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your relationship coaching forward
items: Schedule an initial consultation with a qualified relationship coach or therapist
Complete a relationship assessment questionnaire together with your partner
Create a weekly check-in schedule with your partner to discuss relationship goals and progress
Write down your individual relationship values and compare them with your partner
Research and document your relationship history timeline together
Establish clear boundaries and communication agreements for your coaching work
